[textmode.js](../../../index.md) / [Textmodifier](../../Textmodifier.md) / max

# Method: max()

## Call Signature

```ts
max(...values): number;
```

Return the largest value in a sequence.

### Parameters

| Parameter | Type | Description |
| ------ | ------ | ------ |
| ...`values` | `number`[] | Values to compare. |

### Returns

`number`

Largest value.

### Example

<TextmodeApiSandbox profile="textmode.js" language="javascript" title="max" encoded-code="-_IDEyMCA6IDgwLCBpc0hpZ2ggPyAyNTUgOiAxNDAsIGlzSGlnaCA_" />

## Call Signature

```ts
max(values): number;
```

Return the largest value in an array.

### Parameters

| Parameter | Type | Description |
| ------ | ------ | ------ |
| `values` | readonly `number`[] | Values to compare. |

### Returns

`number`

Largest value.

### Example

<TextmodeApiSandbox profile="textmode.js" language="javascript" title="max" encoded-code="-_IDEyMCA6IDgwLCBpc0hpZ2ggPyAyNTUgOiAxNDAsIGlzSGlnaCA_" />
